caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden lectern, delivering a speech against a backdrop of a textured, dark green wall with geometric patterns. He is dressed in a light-colored kurta and a matching sleeveless Nehru jacket. Two microphones are positioned on the lectern in front of him. As the sequence progresses, he uses various hand gestures to emphasize his points: first raising his right hand with a finger pointed upward, then spreading both arms wide, followed by raising his right hand in a wave-like motion, and finally resting his hands near the lectern. To his right, a tall, cylindrical glass vase containing small pink flowers is visible. The setting remains consistent throughout the clip, with only the man's posture and gestures changing as he speaks.
